SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.corrosion

Class PipeSegmentIntegrity.SegmentResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.corrosion.PipeSegmentIntegrity.SegmentResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
PipeSegmentIntegrity
public static class PipeSegmentIntegrity.SegmentResult extends Object implements Serializable
Per-segment integrity result.

  • Constructor Details

    • SegmentResult

      public SegmentResult(int index, double temperatureC, double pressureBara, double velocityMs, double corrosionRateMmYr, double caco3SI, double scaleGrowthMmYr, double pH)
      Creates a per-segment result.
      Parameters:
      index - the segment index
      temperatureC - segment temperature in degrees Celsius
      pressureBara - segment pressure in bara
      velocityMs - segment flow velocity in m/s
      corrosionRateMmYr - CO2 corrosion rate in mm/yr
      caco3SI - CaCO3 saturation index
      scaleGrowthMmYr - scale growth rate in mm/yr
      pH - the pH used for the segment

  • Method Details

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Gets the segment index.
      Returns:
      the zero-based segment index

    • getTemperatureC

      public double getTemperatureC()
      Gets the segment temperature.
      Returns:
      temperature in degrees Celsius

    • getPressureBara

      public double getPressureBara()
      Gets the segment pressure.
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getVelocityMs

      public double getVelocityMs()
      Gets the segment flow velocity.
      Returns:
      velocity in m/s

    • getCorrosionRateMmYr

      public double getCorrosionRateMmYr()
      Gets the CO2 corrosion rate.
      Returns:
      corrosion rate in mm/yr

    • getCaCO3SI

      public double getCaCO3SI()
      Gets the CaCO3 saturation index.
      Returns:
      CaCO3 saturation index

    • getScaleGrowthMmYr

      public double getScaleGrowthMmYr()
      Gets the scale growth rate.
      Returns:
      scale growth rate in mm/yr

    • getPH

      public double getPH()
      Gets the pH used for the segment.
      Returns:
      the segment pH
